Xu, Faros, Caecus + Celeste or Goliath
Can use that as a placeholder for the time being

Game plan for that would be

1. Pop Embryos on Xu, they will grant her 30 Aliemus 
2. Stall for Turns with Aequor's Transquil Sea (White) Stance, it will grant Shield 
3.  Triggering Resonance (after playing 3 Cards, Xu's Next Card will trigger Resonance) on Xu's 2-Cost Card to apply Spellbound
4. Casting Xu's Exalt (Ultimate) to apply Spellbound if Target has less than 4-5 Stacks
5. If the Target has at least 4-5 Stacks of Spellbound, instead trigger it through Xu's Exalt
6. Apply Poison on Targets through Faros' 2 & 1- Cost Cards 
7. Trigger the Poison Stacks on the Targets through Xu's 3-Cosf Card 
8. Generate Shield through Caecus' base Defense
9. Generate 1 Arithmatecia through Celeste's 0-Cost Card
10. Decrease Damage Taken through Celeste's 3-Cost Card, it will apply Weakness
11. If you will die in a Turn, cast Celeste's Exalt to revive yourself (once per Battle)
12. Every 3 - 4 Turns, consume Crimson Furnace to recover Health
